form.formComment: Three-year-old filly making debut by Castelvecchio out of Simply Wonderful. Won a jump-out at Mornington on April 8. Looks to have good ability, respecting.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Three-year-old filly making debut by Castelvecchio out of Simply Wonderful. Won a jump-out at Mornington on April 8. Looks to have good ability, respecting.

form.formComment: Was at big odds at debut, second last of 10 at Bendigo 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 27 over 1000m, 7 len behind Outer Banks carrying 56kg at $31. Others look better prospects.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Was at big odds at debut, second last of 10 at Bendigo 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 27 over 1000m, 7 len behind Outer Banks carrying 56kg at $31. Others look better prospects.

form.formComment: Last start second last of 7 at Kembla Grange F&M Mdn-Sw on March 21 over 1400m, on a slow track; 7 len behind Rach carrying 57.5kg at $11. The race before that sat on the speed and boxed on steadily second last of 7 at Newcastle Mdn on February 28 over 1600m, on a slow track; 6 len behind Emerald Hills with 56kg at $17. Rough chance at best.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2). Last start second last of 7 at Kembla Grange F&M Mdn-Sw on March 21 over 1400m, on a slow track; 7 len behind Rach carrying 57.5kg at $11. The race before that sat on the speed and boxed on steadily second last of 7 at Newcastle Mdn on February 28 over 1600m, on a slow track; 6 len behind Emerald Hills with 56kg at $17. Rough chance at best.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began very awkwardly and lost ground.

form.formComment: Three-year-old filly (Alabama Express - Rue De Rennes) who was bought for AUD $ 75,000 (Inglis 2024 Premier Yearling Sale). She has four recent trials prior to her debut today. Won her most recent trial at Traralgon over 1100m on April 9. Respecting with top jockey booked.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Last start 4th of 7 at Geelong 3yo F Mdn-Sw on April 1 over 1200m, 2 len behind Farakta carrying 57kg at $9. The race before that 4th of 12 at this track 3yo F Mdn-Sw on March 19 over 1000m, on a slow track; 1.4 len behind Invincible Lover with 57kg at $7.50. Draws out again but able to play a role.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Recent form sound. Last start 4th of 7 at Geelong 3yo F Mdn-Sw on April 1 over 1200m, 2 len behind Farakta carrying 57kg at $9. form.formComment: Second-up. Promising on debut raced on speed throughout when 2nd of 11 at this track Mdn-Sw on November 7 over 1200m, on rain affected going; 0.5 len behind Motorsports with 56kg at $11. Returned from break 3rd of 14 at Bendigo Mdn-Sw on March 27 over 1300m, 1.2 len behind Power And The Beat with 57kg at $1.50. Profiles well and will be very hard to catch.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Second-up. Promising on debut raced on speed throughout when 2nd of 11 at this track Mdn-Sw on November 7 over 1200m, on rain affected going; 0.5 len behind Motorsports with 56kg at $11. Returned from break 3rd of 14 at Bendigo Mdn-Sw on March 27 over 1300m, 1.2 len behind Power And The Beat with 57kg at $1.50. Profiles well and will be very hard to catch.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly through the early stages and wide without cover throughout.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming tried to lead throughout but was claimed late 2nd in a small field at Sale 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 1 over 1427m, in the wet; nose behind Wetumpka carrying 56kg at $3.40. Second-up raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 8 at Sale 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 29 over 1400m, slow going 6 len behind Boomeroo carrying 56kg at $2.20. Just fair last time but the fresh run said she won't be a maiden long.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming 2nd of 9 at Kyneton 3yo F Mdn-Sw on March 13 over 1206m, 2.75 len behind Milos Filos with 57kg at $4.40. Second-up 2nd of 9 at Geelong Mdn-Sw on April 1 over 1400m, nose behind Fastobeast with 57kg at $2.70. Can improve and go one better.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2). Third-up today. Resuming 2nd of 9 at Kyneton 3yo F Mdn-Sw on March 13 over 1206m, 2.75 len behind Milos Filos with 57kg at $4.40. Second-up 2nd of 9 at Geelong Mdn-Sw on April 1 over 1400m, nose behind Fastobeast with 57kg at $2.70. Can improve and go one better.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow into stride. Had difficulty securing clear running rounding the home turn.

form.formComment: Was as a despised roughie at debut, second last of 7 at Geelong 3yo F Mdn-Sw on April 1 over 1200m, 4 len behind Farakta with 57kg at $51. Can improve.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3). Was as a despised roughie at debut, second last of 7 at Geelong 3yo F Mdn-Sw on April 1 over 1200m, 4 len behind Farakta with 57kg at $51. Can improve.

form.formComment: Was at a huge quote at debut, 8th of 11 at this track 3yo Mdn-Sw on April 2 over 1200m, slow going 8 len behind Gazerati with 56kg at $81. Should improve but still looking elsewhere.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2.5). Was at a huge quote at debut, 8th of 11 at this track 3yo Mdn-Sw on April 2 over 1200m, slow going 8 len behind Gazerati with 56kg at $81. Should improve but still looking elsewhere.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: On jumping shifted out abruptly, became unbalanced and lost ground.

form.formComment: Filly by Shocking facing the starter for the first time. Fitter for a jump-out on March 31 at Pakenham when finished sixth. Could be ready to run well.
